headline: How The Mondelez (MDLZ) Narrative Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Diverge Around 2026 CAGNY
summary: Mondelez International’s fair value estimate has been nudged slightly lower from US$66.92 to US$66.88, a shift of less than 0.1% that keeps the core valuation view essentially unchanged. Around the 2026 CAGNY conference, you have seen some firms trim their price targets by US$2 to US$6 while others lift them by US$1 to US$3, which helps explain why the modeled fair value has moved only marginally even as opinions diverge. Read on to see how you can track these evolving analyst views and what...
